message: test: add GEXF parser fuzz target

files.patch:
@@ -35,6 +35,11 @@ name = "fuzz_graphml"
 path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_graphml.rs"
 doc = false
 
+[[bin]]
+name = "fuzz_gexf"
+path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_gexf.rs"
+doc = false
+
 [[bin]]
 name = "fuzz_gml"
 path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_gml.rs"

@@ -0,0 +1,26 @@
+<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
+<gexf version="1.2">
+  <graph mode="static" defaultedgetype="directed">
+    <attributes class="node">
+      <attribute id="0" title="color" type="string"/>
+    </attributes>
+    <attributes class="edge">
+      <attribute id="1" title="capacity" type="integer"/>
+    </attributes>
+    <nodes>
+      <node id="s" label="source">
+        <attvalues>
+          <attvalue for="0" value="red"/>
+        </attvalues>
+      </node>
+      <node id="t" label="target"/>
+    </nodes>
+    <edges>
+      <edge id="e0" source="s" target="t">
+        <attvalues>
+          <attvalue for="1" value="7"/>
+        </attvalues>
+      </edge>
+    </edges>
+  </graph>
+</gexf>

@@ -0,0 +1,19 @@
+<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
+<gexf version="1.2">
+  <graph mode="static" defaultedgetype="directed">
+    <attributes class="edge">
+      <attribute id="weight-class" title="weight-class" type="integer"/>
+    </attributes>
+    <nodes>
+      <node id="left"/>
+      <node id="right"/>
+    </nodes>
+    <edges>
+      <edge id="bad-attr" source="left" target="right">
+        <attvalues>
+          <attvalue for="weight-class" value="not-an-integer"/>
+        </attvalues>
+      </edge>
+    </edges>
+  </graph>
+</gexf>

@@ -0,0 +1,12 @@
+<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
+<gexf version="1.2">
+  <graph mode="static" defaultedgetype="undirected">
+    <nodes>
+      <node id="a" label="A"/>
+      <node id="b" label="B"/>
+    </nodes>
+    <edges>
+      <edge id="0" source="a" target="b" weight="1.5"/>
+    </edges>
+  </graph>
+</gexf>
